import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{api}from"../config";import axios from"axios";import Navbar from"../components/Navbar";import ChatBox from"../components/ChatBox";import noimg from"../assets/no-image.png";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function MyPosts(){const[myItems,setMyItems]=useState([]);const[chatItem,setChatItem]=useState(null);const[images,setImages]=useState({});useEffect(()=>{// Get my post IDs from localStorage
const myPostIds=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("myPostIds")||"[]");if(myPostIds.length===0)return;// Fetch all items and filter mine
axios.get("".concat(api,"/item")).then(res=>{const all=res.data.data;const mine=all.filter(item=>myPostIds.includes(item._id));setMyItems(mine);// Load images
mine.forEach(item=>{axios.get("".concat(api,"/files/").concat(item.image)).then(()=>setImages(prev=>({...prev,[item._id]:"".concat(api,"/files/").concat(item.image)}))).catch(()=>setImages(prev=>({...prev,[item._id]:noimg})));});});},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{style:{padding:"24px 16px",maxWidth:600,margin:"0 auto"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:{color:"#fdf004",marginBottom:20},children:"\uD83D\uDCCB My Posts"}),myItems.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"#aaa",textAlign:"center",marginTop:60},children:"You haven't posted anything yet."}):myItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{background:"#1a1a1a",border:"1px solid #333",borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:images[item._id]||noimg,alt:"",style:{width:70,height:70,borderRadius:8,objectFit:"cover"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{flex:1},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{style:{color:"#fff",margin:"0 0 4px",fontSize:16},children:item.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"#aaa",margin:"0 0 10px",fontSize:13},children:item.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setChatItem(item),style:{background:"#fdf004",border:"none",borderRadius:8,padding:"6px 16px",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13},children:"\uD83D\uDCAC See Messages"})]})]},item._id))]}),chatItem&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ChatBox,{itemId:chatItem._id,onClose:()=>setChatItem(null)})]});}
